query:
CREATE TABLE `clients` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `cpfCnpj` varchar(20),
  `rg` varchar(30),
  `email` varchar(320),
  `phone` varchar(30),
  `address` text,
  `birthDate` varchar(20),
  `maritalStatus` varchar(30),
  `nationality` varchar(50),
  `profession` varchar(100),
  `motherName` varchar(255),
  `fatherName` varchar(255),
  `clientRole` enum('comprador','vendedor','locador','locatario','fiador','corretor') DEFAULT 'comprador',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `clients_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `properties` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `street` varchar(255),
  `number` varchar(20),
  `complement` varchar(100),
  `neighborhood` varchar(100),
  `city` varchar(100),
  `state` varchar(2),
  `zipCode` varchar(10),
  `registration` varchar(50),
  `registryOffice` varchar(255),
  `area` varchar(50),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `properties_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `deals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('venda','locacao','permuta','financiamento') NOT NULL,
  `subtype` varchar(50),
  `status` enum('rascunho','em_andamento','contrato_gerado','assinatura','concluido') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'rascunho',
  `sellerId` int,
  `buyerId` int,
  `propertyId` int,
  `brokerId` int,
  `totalValue` decimal(15,2),
  `monthlyValue` decimal(15,2),
  `paymentModality` varchar(50),
  `notes` text,
  `docsTotal` int DEFAULT 7,
  `docsCompleted` int DEFAULT 0,
  `progressPct` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `deals_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `documents` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `dealId` int,
  `clientId` int,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `docType` enum('rg','cpf','cnh','comprovante_residencia','matricula','iptu','certidao','contrato','outro') DEFAULT 'outro',
  `fileUrl` text,
  `fileKey` varchar(500),
  `mimeType` varchar(100),
  `fileSize` int,
  `ocrStatus` enum('pending','processing','done','failed') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `ocrText` text,
  `ocrFields` json,
  `ocrConfidence` int,
  `docStatus` enum('pendente','extraido','validado','rejeitado') DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `documents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `contracts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `dealId` int,
  `code` varchar(30),
  `nomeVendedor` varchar(255),
  `nacionalidadeVendedor` varchar(50),
  `estadoCivilVendedor` varchar(30),
  `profissaoVendedor` varchar(100),
  `tipoDocumentoVendedor` varchar(10),
  `numeroDocumentoVendedor` varchar(50),
  `cpfCnpjVendedor` varchar(20),
  `enderecoVendedor` text,
  `nomeComprador` varchar(255),
  `nacionalidadeComprador` varchar(50),
  `estadoCivilComprador` varchar(30),
  `profissaoComprador` varchar(100),
  `tipoDocumentoComprador` varchar(10),
  `numeroDocumentoComprador` varchar(50),
  `cpfCnpjComprador` varchar(20),
  `enderecoComprador` text,
  `descricaoImovel` text,
  `matriculaImovel` varchar(50),
  `cartorioRegistroImoveis` varchar(255),
  `itensImovel` text,
  `valorTotalContrato` varchar(100),
  `modalidadePagamento` varchar(30),
  `valorPagamentoAvista` varchar(100),
  `formaPagamentoAvista` varchar(50),
  `dataPagamentoAvista` varchar(20),
  `valorFinanciamento` varchar(100),
  `instituicaoFinanceira` varchar(100),
  `descricaoImovelPermuta` text,
  `valorImovelPermuta` varchar(100),
  `ajusteFinanceiroPermuta` text,
  `prazoEntregaPosse` varchar(50),
  `condicaoEntregaPosse` text,
  `prazoEscritura` varchar(50),
  `responsavelDespesas` varchar(50),
  `quantidadeExerciciosIptu` varchar(10),
  `prazoCertidaoObjetoPe` varchar(50),
  `prazoRestituicaoValores` varchar(50),
  `percentualComissao` varchar(20),
  `valorComissao` varchar(100),
  `percentualMulta` varchar(20),
  `condicoesDistrato` text,
  `plataformaAssinatura` varchar(50),
  `razaoSocialImobiliaria` varchar(255),
  `cnpjImobiliaria` varchar(20),
  `creciImobiliaria` varchar(30),
  `enderecoImobiliaria` text,
  `foroEleito` varchar(100),
  `cidadeAssinatura` varchar(100),
  `dataAssinatura` varchar(20),
  `nomeTestemunha1` varchar(255),
  `cpfTestemunha1` varchar(20),
  `nomeTestemunha2` varchar(255),
  `cpfTestemunha2` varchar(20),
  `pdfUrl` text,
  `pdfKey` varchar(500),
  `contractStatus` enum('rascunho','gerado','enviado','assinado') DEFAULT 'rascunho',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `contracts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `activities` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `dealId` int,
  `type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `activities_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
